title: The Fairies' Secret Factory (1)
overview: After a conversation with the fairies about the current plight of humanity, strange things begin to appear around the small village.

title: The Fairies' Secret Factory (2)
overview: The group struggles to stay together but is continuously pulled apart by an unknown force. Reaching the conference room will prove to be difficult.

title: The Fairies' Subculture (1)
overview: Y was assigned to work on the Human Monument project, but instead kicks off the BL manga revolution.

title: The Fairies' Subculture (2)
overview: Y, the mediator and her assistant are stuck in a strange manga world. They must find a way to escape or risk losing their sanity.

title: The Fairies' Homecoming (1)
overview: The mediator learns that fairies are leaving to avoid electromagnetic waves generated by an electric-powered festival. Later, the mediator and her assistant find themselves once again trapped.

title: The Fairies' Homecoming (2)
overview: Pion joins the team along with their companion Oyage. When pursued, the group lands in an underground castle where danger strikes yet again.

title: The Fairies' Time Management (1)
overview: Something strange is happening with the mediator as she encounters someone who looks just like her! What is happening, and what do sweets have to do with it?

title: The Fairies' Time Management (2)
overview: The fairies will stop at nothing to get more sweets. Their insistence affects more than just the mediator.

title: The Fairies' Survival Skills
overview: There is an overpopulation of fairies, and the mediator must find them a new home. When they end up stranded on an island, there is only room for one ruler!

title: The Fairies' Earth
overview: The mediator starts a new job and is already a god by the end of the first day! Can her winning streak last?

title: The Fairies' Secret Tea Party (1)
overview: The mediator recounts her first years at school as a target of bullying, and she thinks about all the unique people she met growing up.

title: The Fairies' Secret Tea Party (2)
overview: Mediator has settled in her role of the Wild Rose Society and is continuing her rapid ascent to becoming a 6th year. But a night spent with Y will rock her very core.
